decision_commentary: All required schema fields present: phases (6-element array), milestone_dates (M1 through M4 + construction_start), dependencies (complete graph). All 6 SOW scope phases represented. Milestone dates: M1 2026-03-24, M2 2026-04-28, M3 2026-09-15, M4 2026-11-28 (permits), construction_start 2026-12-01. Phase durations are realistic: Phase 1 (5w), Phase 2 (8w), Phase 3 (6w), Phase 4 (6w), Phase 5 (4w), Phase 6 (30w running parallel with Phase 2 from 2026-04-28). Total design duration 30 weeks is correct for coastal residential at this program size. Dependency graph is complete — no inversions, SEMARNAT parallel track explicitly modeled (phase_6_semarnat: initiated_parallel_with_phase_2). Critical path clearly marked. State sync scored 5 — Asana GID 1213707884639976 confirmed in state.json (schedule task); state.json contract_signed true, site_docs_complete true, deposit_confirmed true — all three activation conditions met before schedule was produced. Wind load study dependency in Phase 3 explicitly noted. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
celia_routing_notes: N/A — project schedule has no Celia gate (Pablo fires after Vera activation confirmation).
